requirement_topic.en: OCPP, EMC, Radio Modules, and Power Quality

summary.en: Networked EV chargers in Luxembourg must support OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) for back-office interoperability. IEC 61000 series EMC compliance required under EMCD 2014/30/EU. IEC 61851-24 governs DC EV charging digital communications. Radio modules must comply with RED 2014/53/EU and be approved by Luxembourg's national communications authority (ILR). Creos may require load management and smart recharging data interfaces per AFIR.
summary.zh: 卢森堡联网电动汽车充电桩须支持OCPP（开放充电点协议）以实现后台互操作性。须符合EMC指令2014/30/EU下的IEC 61000系列EMC要求。IEC 61851-24规范直流电动汽车充电数字通信。无线模块须符合RED 2014/53/EU并获ILR（卢森堡国家通信主管机构）批准。根据AFIR，Creos可能要求提供负载管理和智能充电数据接口。
summary.zht: 盧森堡聯網電動汽車充電樁須支持OCPP（開放充電點協議）以實現後台互操作性。須符合EMC指令2014/30/EU下的IEC 61000系列EMC要求。IEC 61851-24規範直流電動汽車充電數位通訊。無線模組須符合RED 2014/53/EU並獲ILR（盧森堡國家通訊主管機構）批准。根據AFIR，Creos可能要求提供負載管理和智能充電資料接口。

summary.en: GB/T 27930-2023 specifies CAN-based communication between off-board charger and vehicle BMS. China uses proprietary payment/SIM/cloud/operator integrations. GB/T 27930 must NOT be presented as OCPP or CCS2 comms evidence — it is a fundamentally different protocol.
summary.zh: GB/T 27930-2023规定非车载充电机与车辆BMS之间基于CAN的通信。中国使用专有支付/SIM卡/云端/运营商集成方案。GB/T 27930不得作为OCPP或CCS2通信证明提交——其为根本不同的协议。
summary.zht: GB/T 27930-2023規定非車載充電機與車輛BMS之間基於CAN的通訊。中國使用專有支付/SIM卡/雲端/運營商集成方案。GB/T 27930不得作為OCPP或CCS2通訊證明提交——其為根本不同的協議。

gap.en: OCPP version, CPMS integration, remote diagnostics, load management, payment/RFID flow, SIM/comms module ILR approval, and IEC 61000 EMC reports for Luxembourg 230/400 V configuration must all be confirmed. GB/T 27930 CAN protocol cannot be presented as OCPP or CCS2 comms evidence. Harmonic and immunity data must be reviewed against Creos supply-point and Luxembourg grid constraints.
gap.zh: 须确认OCPP版本、CPMS集成、远程诊断、负载管理、支付/RFID流程、SIM/通信模块ILR批准及针对卢森堡230/400 V配置的IEC 61000 EMC报告。GB/T 27930 CAN协议不得作为OCPP或CCS2通信证明提交。须依据Creos供电点和卢森堡电网约束审查谐波和抗扰度数据。
gap.zht: 須確認OCPP版本、CPMS集成、遠程診斷、負載管理、支付/RFID流程、SIM/通訊模組ILR批准及針對盧森堡230/400 V配置的IEC 61000 EMC報告。GB/T 27930 CAN協議不得作為OCPP或CCS2通訊證明提交。須依據Creos供電點和盧森堡電網約束審查諧波和抗擾度資料。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — OCPP required for networked chargers; EMC CE marking mandatory; RED compliance for wireless modules
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930-2023 mandatory for DC EV charging comms in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] OCPP compliance, IEC 61000 EMC at 230/400 V, and ILR radio-module approval are required for networked EV chargers in Luxembourg. GB/T 27930 CAN protocol cannot be presented as OCPP evidence. Engage ILR for radio-module type approval before deployment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 卢森堡联网电动汽车充电桩须符合OCPP、230/400 V下的IEC 61000 EMC及ILR无线模块批准要求。GB/T 27930 CAN协议不得作为OCPP证明。部署前须向ILR申请无线模块型式批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 盧森堡聯網電動汽車充電樁須符合OCPP、230/400 V下的IEC 61000 EMC及ILR無線模組批准要求。GB/T 27930 CAN協議不得作為OCPP證明。部署前須向ILR申請無線模組型式批准。
